text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Trainer... We did it, wereally did it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With all the heavens observing my<n>trial, I managed
to put on a race that<n>will not invite their scorn. With
this, my<n>life has run its course...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I'm still alive and kicking, but<n>still... I'm just
so happy with this<n>result! Praise be!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on, no need for that! I just<n>did what I
could.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Although... I can say that Suzuka and I<n>have forged
a brilliant testament to<n>our generation's Derby!
choice_data_list: Are you ready for the next challenge?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, I guess so... But the next<n>one should be
easier, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: We must consult the sticks! Oh, thisdoesn't bode well... Alas, there canbe no doubt!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The divination stick is engraved with<n>the venerable
crest of the Kikuka<n>chrysanthemum. Which can
only<n>mean—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gyahhhhh! Let it be anything but that!<n>Gods,
Buddha, Trainer, anyone—have<n>mercy!

The Kikuka Sho is 3,000 meters long!<n>And the
dreaded Yodo Hill on the third<n>corner is even
steeper than the abyss<n>that leads to the
underworld!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't have enough luck for that kind<n>of distance!
Let's go somewhere<n>shorter!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk... You're right. The gods do work<n>in mysterious
ways...

So be it! Even bad—nay, grave<n>circumstances can
still be turned<n>around!
